raw.message: Players protest, fans shout... The decision is yours!

hook.summary: Influencer reacts to his referee performance score in a split-screen format.
hook.visual_action: A man speaks to the camera while the bottom half of the screen shows a game report from a referee simulator.

scene_flow: Influencer reviews his referee performance score on a split-screen layout.
Close-up of the game's 'Referee Observer' report detailing specific foul decisions.
Cinematic transition to a 3D rendered soccer stadium with a ball in motion.
End card displays the game title 'Referee Simulator' with a call-to-action button.
audience_proxy: Male soccer fans who enjoy simulation games and testing their sports knowledge.
